discovery.text: Vancouver's beloved Lebanese restaurant. Cauliflower is legendary. Warm atmosphere, shareable plates, great for casual dinner with a friend. Multiple locations but Gastown is the original and best. Rating 4.3/5 (3,190 reviews). $$ — very affordable.
